violations.description: Handwashing lavatories. — --Handwashing lavatory was not provided in sufficient number and/or not accessible to allow convenient use by employees. -Drink cups in hand sink basin. *COS-moved to left side of 3 comp sink.
Receptacles for refuse, recyclables, and returnables. — --Adequate refuse receptacle was not provided in food establishment. -No trash can near hand sink.

Preventing contamination of packaged and unpackaged food. — --Raw animal food was not properly separated from raw or cooked ready-to-eat food . -Raw chislic stored in top of prep table next to/between ready to eat items (would have to reach over onions to get chislic).

Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Nonfood contact surface was not cleaned as frequently as required. -Cheese spill around hot hold unit top and sides. -Spill/residue on lids of containers below hot hold.
Receptacles for refuse, recyclables, and returnables. — --Adequate refuse receptacle was not provided in food establishment. Over flow of trash at bus tub of dirty dishes and in crate below grill.

Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…) were not maintained in good repair. -Floor peeling up near freezer.--Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…)* were not clean or not cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. -Spill of grease throughout floor area.
Sanitizing solution testing devices. — --Test strip or kit that accurately measures the sanitizing concentration was not provided. -Could not locate Quat test strips.

Handling and storage of poisonous and toxic materials. — --Cleaning, sanitizing or drying agents were not adequately stored separate from poisonous, toxic materials or pesticides. -Fly spray stored at 3-comp sink. (COS-moved below 3 comp sink.)
Number, location, accessibility, soap and paper towels provided (3 pts deducted)
Handwashing, good hygienic practices (5 pts deducted)
Clean, proper use, storage, sanitizing solution (2 pts deducted)
Properly designed, located, constructed, operated, maintained, cleaned and chemical test kit provided (2 pts deducted)
Clean, proper use, storage, sanitizing solution (2 pts deducted)
